rationale: Gov't Code §2001.030 governs agency rulemaking procedure (statement of reasons). The proposed statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not conflict; any consequential rulemaking would follow normal §2001.030 procedures.
quote: On adoption of a rule, a state agency, if requested to do so by an interested person either before adoption or not later than the 30th day after the date of adoption, shall issue a concise statement of the principal reasons for and against its adoption.
_note: No conflict; §2001.030 is a general administrative procedure provision applicable to agency rulemaking, not implicated by a statutory dollar-amount change.
